message:
feat(ui): add spring-animated modal backdrop dimming and search focus glow

Introduce two visual polish features to the TUI:

1. **Modal backdrop dimming** — When any modal is open (export, bulk,
   saved views, help, theme editor, inspector, source filter, or command
   palette), a full-screen dimmed backdrop now fades in behind the modal
   content.  The opacity tracks the `modal_open` spring animation so it
   smoothly transitions in/out rather than popping.  The dim color is
   derived from the theme's background blended 45% toward black via a
   new `STYLE_MODAL_BACKDROP` style token.

2. **Search focus glow** — The active search/query inset now uses a
   dedicated `STYLE_SEARCH_FOCUS` style token (accent foreground + 18%
   accent-tinted background + bold) instead of reusing the generic
   `STYLE_TAB_ACTIVE`.  This gives the focused search bar a subtle
   accent glow that visually distinguishes it from tab highlighting.

Implementation details:
- `lerp_u8()` helper for linear interpolation between two u8 color
  components, used to blend backdrop color by the spring position.
- `anim.open_modal()` / `anim.close_modal()` are now driven every tick
  based on the aggregate modal-open state, keeping the spring target
  synchronized with the UI.
- `build_stylesheet()` gains two new entries for the new style tokens
  with test coverage asserting their presence in the style sheet.
- Snapshot `cassapp_baseline_role_gutters_messages.snap` updated to
  reflect the new message counter badges ([1/4], [2/4], etc.) and
  inter-message separator lines in the role gutter rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
